title: UDP Packet Structure and Transmission Flow
description: A visual breakdown of the User Datagram Protocol (UDP) header format and the connectionless data transmission process between sender and receiver.
relationships: Sender app passes data to UDP, which encapsulates it into a datagram with a header
UDP sends the datagram to IP for routing without establishing a connection
IP transmits the packet across the network to the destination
Receiver's UDP strips the header and delivers the data to the waiting application
